title: Crisp Spanish Hazelnut Stir-fry
description: A low-fat-friendly romantic dish featuring marinated hazelnuts that add a nutty umami flavor to the crisp and aromatic stir-fry base.
instructions: Soak hazelnuts in water for at least 2 hours. Drain and lightly toast them until golden brown, about 3 minutes.
In a bowl, mix chicken broth, lemon juice, dijon mustard, and garlic. Let it sit for at least an hour to infuse flavors.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the marinated hazelnuts and stir-fry until they start to get crisp, about 3 minutes.
Add red bell pepper strips and green onions to the wok. Stir-fry for another minute until vegetables are slightly tender.
Pour in the marinade mixture and continue stirring until the sauce thickens and coats the hazelnuts and vegetables well, about 2 more minutes.
Remove from heat and serve garnished with sesame seeds.
